## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX delivered 10 articles last week, on track for 7 new ones this week](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Performance improving: impressions and clicks increasing for GrowthX-created articles](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [Content strategy shift: moving from high-level informational to more granular, ICP-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Need for more persona-specific data and industry insights to refine content approach](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [10 articles delivered last week, 7 new ones coming this week](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Addressing Rapyd's edits for reviewed articles](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Testing automated XML fixes for smoother publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [XML batch including all approved articles by tomorrow to be sent end of week](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### Performance Reporting

  - [New Looker dashboard provides comprehensive view of website and GrowthX article performance](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

  - LLM referral traffic still low for GrowthX articles (\< 10% of total)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Current content deemed too high-level and informational](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Shift towards more granular, product-tied, and ICP-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Request for updated persona information and sales insights to tailor content better](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Hot topics identified: improving authorization rates, benchmarks by region, AI in authorization](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

  - [Mark to share "swipe file" with relevant publications and social media accounts](https://fathom.video/share/SpzXtsrRJrNaXjWNZ1KojAP7WS9wgm9g?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
